name: R F INDUSTRIES LTD
summary: RF Industries, Ltd. is a national manufacturer and marketer of interconnect products and systems, including RF connectors and adapters, coaxial cables, fiber optic cables, custom cabling, wire harnesses, dividers, directional couplers, filters, energy-efficient cooling systems, and integrated small cell enclosures. The company serves telecommunications carriers, wireless and network infrastructure manufacturers, and OEMs. Operations are conducted through facilities in California and the Northeastern United States, with products distributed through national distributors and direct OEM accounts.
